message:
feat(cli): implement full enrich command with vector indexes

- Add ONNX FFI with conditional compilation via build options
- Implement core enrich pipeline: read input, generate embeddings, write output
- Add mock embeddings (hash-based) when ONNX unavailable
- Create FlatIndex for exact k-NN search (L2/cosine/inner product)
- Create IvfPqIndex for approximate search with product quantization
- Serialize and persist vector indexes alongside Lance output
- Support --index-type flat|ivf-pq and --partitions options
